title: Aaditya Thackeray Signals End To NCP Reunion Talks
description: Mr. Pawar filed his nomination for a Rajya Sabha seat on Thursday with all alliance partners formally endorsing his candidature. While the filing witnessed a show of strength, with leaders such as Bhaskar Jadhav (Shiv Sena-UBT), Satej Patil (Congress) and MP Supriya Sule in attendance, the absence of Aaditya Thackeray had sparked speculation in political circles.
